name: Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds
description_short: Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds is a credit repair provider based in Los Angeles, California. Rated 4.9/5 with 144 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds is a credit repair provider serving clients in Los Angeles, California. With 144 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a diamond buyer, diamond dealer, jewelry buyer, Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Los Angeles, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Los Angeles, California area who are considering Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
